item.title: This CapCut template makes it look like IShowSpeed is watching your video or reacting to your photo right on his phone screen. It works like a green screen reaction edit, so your image or clip goes inside the phone and instantly turns into a meme, reactio
item.description: By @.memescreens: This CapCut template makes it look like IShowSpeed is watching your video or reacting to your photo right on his phone screen. It works like a green screen reaction edit, so your image or clip goes inside the phone and instantly turns into a meme, reactio

item.title: The viral “Chloe, we’re going to Disneyland” clip didn’t feel like it was trying to go viral — and that’s exactly why it did. During a surprise family announcement, one sister instantly exploded with excitement, while Chloe’s reaction was the complete opp

item.title: "I'm in it for the memes." Actor Antony Starr joins TODAY to talk about the fifth and final season of “The Boys” and how much he's enjoyed playing Homelander, one of the evil superheroes on a quest to remain on top. Starr recreates some of the fans' favor
